title: HDGP-Core Meta guidance object (Meta-only)
description: JSON Schema for weaving HDGP-Core **Meta guidance** fields at development time. This is **not** an Engine/Judge API contract: no verdict, audit chain, or enforcement semantics. Align with `spec/HDGP_INTEGRATION_SPEC.md` §2.4 (defaults) and `spec/HDGP_META_VS_JUDGE_SCOPE.md`.

request_id.description: Correlation id for logs and human review (optional but recommended).

locale.description: BCP 47 / locale tag for UX copy and reviewer context (optional).

channel.description: Surface/channel label (e.g. web, api, batch) — optional.

Scene.description: Scene / scenario semantics for Meta weaving. Defaults when missing per integration spec: domain=general, intent=chat, risk_level=medium.

PolicyRef.description: **Semantic** references to spec/strategy/bundle ids for traceability only — not a promise that any Engine evaluates them.

strategy_id.description: Strategy profile id if your stack uses one (optional).

override_flags.description: Non-normative flags your integration may record (optional).

Domain.description: Scenario domain. Prefer listed values; extend with lowercase_snake custom labels when needed.

Intent.description: Intent of the output path. Prefer listed values; extend with lowercase_snake custom labels when needed.

RiskLevel.description: Risk tier for routing and human review hints.
